title: Pyra's Hand Drawn HD Texture Pack
description: This is a texture pack that makes textures into hand-drawn zombies or whatever of which those textures look suprisingly good...
body:
Hello, I am Pyramid, you can check me out here:

[Pyramid's YT Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@PyramidBrain)

This is a texture pack hand-drawn by me of which is perfect for well... I don't know but you can decide on it :)
Anyway, if you want your textures to look slightly more high definition, download this texture pack and support me on my works outside of Modrinth!

note to all: im likely not to update this, as i dont really have the minecraft textures anymore since i have changed operating systems from windows to a linux distro.
